comment.body:
I don’t get all the negative comments here. As if Alma were some crap analyst.I’ve made hundreds of thousands thanks to her since april.
This market is fucking exhausting and brutal.
You can’t plan long term. It’s stuffed with uncertainty on purpose. I get Alma’s narrative I’m not brain-dead, the pivotal window is about handling tariff effects.
We need to see how the trump economy deals with inflation pressure. Once the picture clears, then you can Plan. Until the September FOMC, it’s short-term scalping only.
There's no need for whining about price action that already happened.
If everyone had known in 2008 that the market would drop, everyone would’ve shorted. Right now the situation is unknowable, and risk is high.
I went all-in long at the April bottom when Alma called it. Not gonna lie i was sweat ing. I was just lucky, plain and simple. Easy to be smart after the fact, you can’t see it in real time.
It sucks reading all these negative comments from a few people.Especially since it mostly comes from their own lack of understanding, shit. Sry
